---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: true
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-block}

# Prerna Tyagi

<p class="role">Applied AI/ML engineering · India</p>

<p class="terminal-tag">// from-scratch implementations · measured on real corpora</p>

A series on what's inside the building blocks of modern AI products — embeddings, retrieval, evals, agents, fine-tuning. Each post is paired with a companion notebook in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth).

:::

<hr/>

<div class="landing-section-heading">Writing</div>
